description: Random 6-character security identifier.
Initial weight from base universe normalised to sum to 1.
Official exchange closing price per share of the security sourced per Appendix VII.
Number of shares of the security held as of end of day t-1 used for index calculation on day t.
Composite inclusion factor (FIF/DIF/GIF/VIF/Index Inclusion Factor) applied to the security market cap.
Price Adjustment Factor applied to a security price on the ex-date of a corporate event to preserve historical comparability.
WMR Closing Spot Rate of security price currency versus USD at 4PM London time.
Internal Currency Index for the security price currency; equals 1 in normal conditions.
Gross dividend per share (before withholding tax) used for reinvestment in MSCI Gross DTR Indexes on ex-date.
Net dividend per share (after maximum withholding tax) used for reinvestment in MSCI Net DTR Indexes on ex-date.
Number of shares on the day preceding the ex-date used to compute the dividend amount to be reinvested.
Boolean flag indicating whether the security traded on the calculation day.
Ex-date of the distribution on which reinvestment is scheduled.
Special or extraordinary cash dividend per share used to test the 5% PAF trigger.
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Index_Calculation_Methodology.md section 2.2.4 Dividends Resulting in a Reinvestment or in a Price Adjustment

description: Status of the event announcement (confirmed/provisional/unconfirmed) used to evaluate the PAF trigger.
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Index_Calculation_Methodology.md section 2.2.4 Dividends Resulting in a Reinvestment or in a Price Adjustment

description: Maximum withholding tax rate applicable to institutional investors used to compute net dividends.
Ratio of bonus shares issued to existing shares for a stock dividend (bonus/gratis) event.
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Index_Calculation_Methodology.md section 2.2.5 Dividends Resulting in a Price Adjustment Only

description: Country where the security is listed; used for country-specific event treatments.
Number of shares received in a Taiwanese stock dividend that are subject to withholding tax.
Par value of each share used to compute Taiwanese stock dividend withholding tax.
Capital repayment amount per share used to apply PAF for extraordinary capital repayments.
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Index_Calculation_Methodology.md section 2.2.5 Dividends Resulting in a Price Adjustment Only

description: Boolean flag indicating whether a capital repayment is deemed extraordinary versus the company dividend policy or historical cash distributions.
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Index_Calculation_Methodology.md section 2.2.5 Dividends Resulting in a Price Adjustment Only

description: Date on which a dividend correction or late dividend was discovered.
Dividend amount applied as a correction within the 12-month window.
Number of shares outstanding at close of cum-date used for correction and payment-default reinvestments.
Boolean flag indicating that a previously announced dividend has been declared unpaid.
Original dividend amount previously reinvested that is reversed on payment default.
Date on which the payment default was confirmed from at least two data sources.
Country of incorporation used to determine the applicable withholding tax rate.
Flag identifying whether the index is domestic or international; drives resident vs non-resident WHT selection.
Published daily level of a component index used to compute a blended index.
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Index_Calculation_Methodology.md section 3 Index Calculation for the MSCI Blended Indexes

description: Fixed proportion assigned to each component index in a blended index; set at rebalance and sums to 1.
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Index_Calculation_Methodology.md section 3 Index Calculation for the MSCI Blended Indexes

description: Day of week on which the index is being calculated (used for Sunday intermediary and Sunday-Thursday logic).
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Index_Calculation_Methodology.md Appendix I Sunday Intermediary Index Calculation

description: Boolean flag indicating that the index follows the Sunday intermediary calculation for Monday-Friday methodology.
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Index_Calculation_Methodology.md Appendix I Sunday Intermediary Index Calculation

description: Number of shares of the security traded during the day; used to compute ATVR.
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Index_Calculation_Methodology.md Appendix II Annualized Traded Value Ratio

description: Number of trading days in the month used for the monthly median traded value calculation.
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Index_Calculation_Methodology.md Appendix II Annualized Traded Value Ratio

description: FIF- or DIF-adjusted market capitalisation of the security at month end used as MTVR denominator.
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Index_Calculation_Methodology.md Appendix II Annualized Traded Value Ratio

description: WMR Closing Spot Rate taken at 4PM London time used as the standard FX rate for MSCI indexes.
Date on which the index is being calculated.
Magnitude of a data error expressed in basis points on the affected index.
Type of index affected by an error (country / World or EM industry group / Frontier Markets region).
Date on which the data error was discovered.
Boolean flag indicating that the index follows the Sunday-to-Thursday trading calendar.
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Index_Calculation_Methodology.md Appendix XII Sunday-Thursday Index Calculation Methodology

description: Dividend per share reinvested in the Sunday-Thursday calendar on Sundays.
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Index_Calculation_Methodology.md Appendix XII Sunday-Thursday Index Calculation Methodology

description: WMR Friday Closing Spot Rate carried forward to Sunday in the Sunday-Thursday calendar.
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Index_Calculation_Methodology.md Appendix XII Sunday-Thursday Index Calculation Methodology

description: Previous year dividend amount from the same period used as the estimate when no current-year estimate is available.
Company-announced estimated dividend amount for the current period (Japan).
Adjustment to the prior-year dividend estimate for any capital changes (Korea enhanced methodology).
Final ratified dividend amount per share used to reconcile the estimated dividend on reception.
Date on which the ratified dividend amount is received and confirmed from at least two data sources.
Number of shares effective on the day prior to the ex-date used for Korean estimated dividend reinvestment.
Boolean flag indicating a USA poison-pill redemption-right event that triggers a price adjustment.
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Index_Calculation_Methodology.md section 2.3.6 Country Exceptions USA Redemption Right
